# The Quest Offerwall — Android SDK (llms.txt)

Kotlin SDK that embeds The Quest offerwall in a hosted WebView inside a dedicated
full-screen Activity with a native header. Public API is essentially just `show()`.

## Install
Maven Central: `implementation("world.humanlabs:quest-offerwall:0.1.0")`
Min SDK 24 (Android 7.0). JDK 17.

## Configure (AndroidManifest <meta-data>, inside <application>)
- `world.humanlabs.quest.APP_ID` (String, required) — 10-char App ID, not secret.
- `world.humanlabs.quest.BASE_URL` (String, optional) — offerwall base URL. Defaults to
  production (https://quest.humanlabs.world). Set for staging (https://quest.seriesc.dev),
  self-hosting, or local dev (http://10.0.2.2:5173 from the Android emulator).
If APP_ID is missing the SDK logs an error and no-ops (never crashes).

## Public API
```kotlin
object TheQuest {
  fun show(
    context: Context,
    userId: String,
    launchProvider: (suspend (userId: String) -> LaunchToken)? = null, // null = standard mode
    onClose: (() -> Unit)? = null,
  )
}
data class LaunchToken(val ts: String, val nonce: String, val sig: String, val locale: String? = null)
```

## Modes
- Standard: `show(context, userId)`. No signing.
- Secure: pass `launchProvider` returning `{ ts, nonce, sig, locale? }` from YOUR backend
  (holds the app secret; never embed it in the app). Provider runs on every show (launches
  expire ±5 min). See docs/SIGNING.md.

## Launch URL
`{base}/?app_id={appId}&user_id={userId}` + secure `&ts=&nonce=&sig=` + always `&locale=`
(device locale mapped to en/id/es/pt, fallback en; secure mode uses the signed locale).

## JS bridge (see docs/BRIDGE.md)
`window.TheQuestNative` shim injected via onPageStarted/onPageFinished; `_post` calls the
`TheQuestAndroid` @JavascriptInterface `postMessage(json)`. Messages: openUrl / close / ready.
`openUrl` opens an external Intent (ACTION_VIEW; supports intent:// + browser_fallback_url).

## Low-end optimizations
XML LinearLayout header (no Compose); single reused WebView destroyed cleanly;
`onRenderProcessGone` finishes gracefully; conservative WebView settings; file/content
access disabled; third-party cookies enabled (qs_session is SameSite=None).

## Key files
- sdk/src/main/kotlin/world/humanlabs/quest/TheQuest.kt — public object + session holder
- sdk/src/main/kotlin/world/humanlabs/quest/OfferwallActivity.kt — WebView host
- sdk/src/main/kotlin/world/humanlabs/quest/config/QuestConfig.kt — manifest reader
- sdk/src/main/kotlin/world/humanlabs/quest/bridge/QuestBridge.kt — @JavascriptInterface
- sdk/src/main/kotlin/world/humanlabs/quest/internal/LaunchUrlBuilder.kt — pure URL builder
- sdk/src/main/kotlin/world/humanlabs/quest/models/LaunchToken.kt
